errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.noPermission: You do not have permission to use this command.
errors.missingBotPermission: I am missing required permissions: {permissions}. Please ask an admin to fix my role.
errors.roleHierarchy: I cannot manage that role. Move my bot role above the target roles in Server Settings → Roles.
errors.roleNotFound: The configured role was not found on this server. Check `config/` role IDs.
errors.userNotFound: That user could not be found.
errors.vipOnly: This command is exclusive to **VIP+** members.
errors.noBoxes: You don't have any **{name}** boxes to open.
errors.selfRep: You cannot give reputation to yourself.
errors.botRep: You cannot give reputation to bots.
errors.invalidAmount: Amount must be a positive number.
errors.invalidLevel: Level must be a positive integer.
errors.guildOnly: This command can only be used in a server.

success.colorCleared: Your custom name color has been removed.
success.maxRank: You already hold the maximum rank: **{rank}**.
success.alreadyRank: You are already **{rank}**. Need **{xp}** more XP for **{next}**.
success.needXp: Not enough XP yet. Need **{xp}** more XP for **{rank}**.

vip.expired: Your **VIP+** membership has expired. Thank you for your support!
vip.none: You don't have an active VIP+ membership.

boxes.opened: You opened a **{name}** box and received:
boxes.vipBonus: Lucky bonus! You won **{duration}** of VIP+!
boxes.inventoryHint: Use `/boxes open <type>` or `$boxes <type>` to open a box.
